'''鈭歵h-w-f-j''' ('''kathawfejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quick|quick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quick|quick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-w-f-j
|-
! Lemma
| kathawfejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithawfejoko|thithawfejoko]] || [[word:jithawfejoko|jithawfejoko]] || [[word:shithawfejoko|shithawfejoko]] || [[word:kithawfejoko|kithawfejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthawfejoko|thuthuthawfejoko]] || [[word:jujuthawfejoko|jujuthawfejoko]] || [[word:shushuthawfejoko|shushuthawfejoko]] || [[word:kukuthawfejoko|kukuthawfejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthawfejoko|thuthawfejoko]] || [[word:juthawfejoko|juthawfejoko]] || [[word:shuthawfejoko|shuthawfejoko]] || [[word:kuthawfejoko|kuthawfejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthawfejoko|thuthawfejoko]] || [[word:juthawfejoko|juthawfejoko]] || [[word:shuthawfejoko|shuthawfejoko]] || [[word:kuthawfejoko|kuthawfejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethawfejoko|thethawfejoko]] || [[word:jethawfejoko|jethawfejoko]] || [[word:shethawfejoko|shethawfejoko]] || [[word:kethawfejoko|kethawfejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothawfejoko|thothothawfejoko]] || [[word:jojothawfejoko|jojothawfejoko]] || [[word:shoshothawfejoko|shoshothawfejoko]] || [[word:kokothawfejoko|kokothawfejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothawfejoko|thothawfejoko]] || [[word:jothawfejoko|jothawfejoko]] || [[word:shothawfejoko|shothawfejoko]] || [[word:kothawfejoko|kothawfejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothawfejoko|thothawfejoko]] || [[word:jothawfejoko|jothawfejoko]] || [[word:shothawfejoko|shothawfejoko]] || [[word:kothawfejoko|kothawfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thawfejoko|th忙thawfejoko]] || [[word:j忙thawfejoko|j忙thawfejoko]] || [[word:sh忙thawfejoko|sh忙thawfejoko]] || [[word:k忙thawfejoko|k忙thawfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathawfejoko|thathathawfejoko]] || [[word:jajathawfejoko|jajathawfejoko]] || [[word:shashathawfejoko|shashathawfejoko]] || [[word:kakathawfejoko|kakathawfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathawfejoko|thathawfejoko]] || [[word:jathawfejoko|jathawfejoko]] || [[word:shathawfejoko|shathawfejoko]] || [[word:kathawfejoko|kathawfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathawfejoko|thathawfejoko]] || [[word:jathawfejoko|jathawfejoko]] || [[word:shathawfejoko|shathawfejoko]] || [[word:kathawfejoko|kathawfejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathawfejithi|shathawfejithi]] || [[word:shathawfejiji|shathawfejiji]] || [[word:shathawfejishi|shathawfejishi]] || [[word:shathawfejiki|shathawfejiki]]

|-
